title: CNR force field builder module - molecular scale
description: (Computational module) - This module takes the polymer structure as an input and generates a molecular mechanics force field, with OPLS used as the default option and GAFF available as an alternative. The tool generates the complete molecular topology, including atom types, bonded and non-bonded parameters, partial charges, and connectivity, providing a fully parameterized polymer structure ready for subsequent MD calculations.
creator: https://ror.org/04zaypm56
